data.reasoning: Both models failed to review the critical PKGBUILD file due to incorrect binary file classification, making safety determination impossible.
coverage_issues: Critical gap: PKGBUILD skipped by both models despite being essential for build/install analysis
No other files reviewed: Potential .install scripts or source files were not examined
false_negatives: All execution risks: Missed analysis of makepkg behaviors (build/package functions) and install hooks
Network/filesystem access: Unverified due to PKGBUILD skip
learnings: Tool must prioritize PKGBUILD as primary text file, never skip as binary
Implement fallback decoding for misclassified files
Add pre-audit file validation step to detect classification errors
Improve model instructions to treat PKGBUILD as mandatory review target
Include file type verification in pre-processing to prevent false binary detection
